infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Travel Diary needs access to your camera to capture travel memories.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Travel Diary needs your location to record where your memories were made.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Travel Diary needs your location to record where your memories were made.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Travel Diary needs access to your photos to save your travel memories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Travel Diary needs permission to save photos to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Travel Diary needs access to your camera to capture travel memories.
